rainfall_outlook: The eastern parts of Turkana and Samburu are expected to receive near- to below-normal rainfall.
samburu_specific: However, the eastern parts of Turkana and Samburu are expected to receive near- to below-normal rainfall.
advisory: Farmers should strengthen field drainage, unclog furrows, and avoid activities that compact already-wet soils.

rainfall_outlook: Rainfall is likely to be near-average to above-average.
samburu_specific: North-western Kenya (Turkana and Samburu Counties): Rainfall is likely to be near-average to above-average. Intermittent rainfall, that may occasionally be heavy, is expected during the first half of the month with onsets expected in the 1st to 2nd weeks of April.

rainfall_outlook: Sunny and dry conditions are expected to prevail. However occasional rainfall may be experienced.
samburu_specific: North-western Region (Turkana, West Pokot, and Samburu): Sunny and dry conditions are expected to prevail in these areas. However occasional rainfall may be experienced.
advisory: The sunny and dry weather conditions will be favorable for crop harvesting as well as land preparations in readiness for the coming planting season in the agricultural areas.

rainfall_outlook: Sunny and dry conditions are expected.
samburu_specific: North-western Region (Turkana, West Pokot and Samburu): Sunny and dry conditions are expected in the month of January.
advisory: The public is advised to invest in water harvesting practices/techniques to harness the rainwater in areas where occasional rainfall is expected.
